Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

82 
DSCHRG_DSTNTN_CD 
LABEL: 
Destination upon discharge from facility code 
DESCRIPTION: The code indicating the destination of the beneficiary upon discharge from a facility; also denotes death 
or skilled nursing facility (SNF)/still patient situations. 
SHORT NAME: DSTNTNCD 
LONG NAME: DSCHRG_DSTNTN_CD 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
This code set is an external code set
